---
title: "Nishita's animint2 gallery"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: false
---

This is a gallery of data visualizations created using the R package
[animint2](https://github.com/animint/animint2) - built for GSoC 2026.

```{r gallery-table, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
nisRepos <- readLines("repo.txt")
nisRepos <- nisRepos[nzchar(trimws(nisRepos))]

nisTitles <- c(
  "Nishita-shah1/bisection-animint" = "Bisection Method",
  "Nishita-shah1/clt-animint"       = "Central Limit Theorem",
  "Nishita-shah1/qqnorm-animint"    = "QQ Plot Simulation",
  "Nishita-shah1/mwar-animint"      = "Moving Window Auto-Regression",
  "Nishita-shah1/sample-animint"    = "Simple Random Sampling"
)

cat('<table border="1" style="border-collapse:collapse;width:100%;font-size:0.95em;">\n')
cat('<thead><tr>',
    '<th style="padding:6px 10px;">viz.link</th>',
    '<th style="padding:6px 10px;">title</th>',
    '<th style="padding:6px 10px;">links</th>',
    '</tr></thead>\n<tbody>\n')

for (nisEntry in nisRepos) {
  nisOwner  <- sub("/.*", "", nisEntry)
  nisRepo   <- sub(".*/", "", nisEntry)
  nisVizUrl <- paste0("https://", nisOwner, ".github.io/", nisRepo, "/")
  nisRepUrl <- paste0("https://github.com/", nisEntry)
  nisGHPUrl <- paste0(nisRepUrl, "/tree/gh-pages")
  nisSrcUrl <- paste0(nisRepUrl, "/blob/main/", gsub("-", "_", nisRepo), ".R")
  nisImgUrl <- paste0("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/", nisEntry, "/gh-pages/Capture.PNG")
  nisTitle  <- ifelse(!is.na(nisTitles[nisEntry]), nisTitles[nisEntry], nisRepo)

  cat(paste0(
    '<tr>',
    '<td style="padding:6px 10px;width:310px;">',
      '<a href="', nisVizUrl, '">',
        '<img src="', nisImgUrl, '" alt="', nisTitle, '"',
             ' width="300" onerror="this.style.display=\'none\'"/>',
      '</a>',
    '</td>',
    '<td style="padding:6px 10px;">', nisTitle, '</td>',
    '<td style="padding:6px 10px;">',
      '<a href="', nisGHPUrl, '">repo</a> ',
      '<a href="', nisSrcUrl, '">source</a>',
    '</td>',
    '</tr>\n'
  ))
}

cat('</tbody>\n</table>\n')
```

[Download repo list: repo.txt](repo.txt)

## Source code

* [This gallery repository](https://github.com/Nishita-shah1/animation-ports-gallery/tree/gh-pages)
* [`animint2::update_gallery()`](https://github.com/animint/animint2/blob/master/R/z_pages.R)
